✦ Our Story

Crafting Luxury
Since 2015

TheLuxeSpa is Lucknow's most trusted unisex salon, combining world-class techniques with a personalised, calming experience.

Our certified professionals bring passion and precision to every service — from everyday styling to grand bridal transformations.
